name: ruby-rubygems
title: ruby-rubygems
description:
Package management framework for Ruby
A package (also known as a library) contains a set of functionality that can
be invoked by a Ruby program, such as reading and parsing an XML file. These
packages are called 'gems' and RubyGems is a tool to install, create, manage
and load these packages in your Ruby environment. RubyGems is also a client for
RubyGems.org, a public repository of Gems that allows you to publish a Gem that
can be shared and used by other developers.

commands.name: gem
commands.description: RubyGems is a package manager for Ruby.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use gem because Package management framework for Ruby.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use gem as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `gem [options] [args]` as documented upstream for gem.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair gem with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `gem --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
